title: leucopogon squarrosus
intro: Leucopogon squarrosus, also known as the Rough Prickly Heath, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae, native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Leucopogon squarrosus include its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Leucopogon squarrosus is typically harvested and prepared as an infusion or tincture, which can be used to make teas, salves, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
